name: uinaf/codex-review
summary: Run the Codex CLI `codex review` command as an advisory closeout pass: choose the right target, run local/branch/commit review, filter findings, and rerun focused tests plus review after fixes. Use when the user asks for Codex review, codex-review, autoreview, second-model review, or a final `codex review` sweep. Do not use for ordinary review verdicts; use `review` for that.
